name: dataCitePublicationType
description: DataCite ResourceTypeGeneral term indicating the broad category of a registered resource.
ExpectedUse: Classification of research outputs according to DataCite's controlled vocabulary for resource types, enabling consistent categorization across repositories and DOI registration agencies.
